business_ideas.idea: Total Man lifestyle brand targeting masculine identity, selling products to audience seeking hard-man ethos
Light Phone alternative smartphone with minimal features, no colors, appeals to digital minimalism trend
Private security startup (Banner Man model) - Uber for security guards, hourly pricing for on-demand protection
Deep Sentinel - AI camera system with live human operators who intervene in real-time security threats
Niche influencer-driven agencies building products for underserved communities (OnlyFans support businesses)

predictions.text: Total Man lifestyle will become dominant trend; brands built around masculine identity will dominate next decade
Counterculture always swings opposite to mainstream status quo within 2-3 years after pendulum peaks
Light phone and privacy-focused tech adoption will accelerate as reaction to data-heavy surveillance platforms
